context_text: So as the planets continued their revolutions, and billions of planets of other solar systems went on in its own, I soon left the sign far behind me, separated from it by the endless fields of space.
normalized_context_text: So as the planets continued their revolutions, and billions of planets of other solar systems went on in its own, I soon left the sign far behind me, separated from it by the endless fields of space.
original_context_text: So as the planets continued their revolutions, and [[the solar system]] went on in its own, I soon left the sign far behind me, separated from it by the endless fields of space.

subject: billions of planets of other solar systems

context_text: My sign had perhaps remained who knows where, behind, completely remote from the revolutionary orbit of our system.
normalized_context_text: My sign had perhaps remained who knows where, behind, completely remote from the revolutionary orbit of our system.
original_context_text: My sign had perhaps remained who knows where, behind, completely remote from the revolutionary orbit of [[our system]].
rendered_context_text: My sign had perhaps remained who knows where, behind, completely remote from the revolutionary orbit of our system.
subject: billions of planets of other solar systems

context_text: Kgwgk's constellation didn't encounter the sign, whereas our solar system turned up there punctually at the end of the first revolution, so close that I was able to erase the whole thing with the greatest care.
normalized_context_text: Kgwgk's constellation didn't encounter the sign, whereas our solar system turned up there punctually at the end of the first revolution, so close that I was able to erase the whole thing with the greatest care.

subject: billions of planets of other solar systems

context_text: The idea of fixing with signs the points where we passed—as it had come to me and to Kgwgk—had occurred to many, scattered over billions of planets of other solar systems, and I was constantly running into one of these things, or a pair, or even a dozen, simple two-dimensional scrawls, or else three-dimensional solids (polyhedrons, for example), or even things constructed with more care, with the fourth dimension and everything.
